member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.BackslashEncoding
member.summary: Helper for handling backslash encoding in strings

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.BackslashEncoding.RemoveWhichIsInString(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Removes positions that are inside strings

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Boilerplate
member.summary: Provides boilerplate code templates for C# code generation

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Boilerplate.CSharpCmd(System.String)
member.summary: Generates C# command-line program boilerplate

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Boilerplate.CSharpClass(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates C# class boilerplate with initialization method

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes
member.summary: TypeScript primitive and built-in type names as string constants.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.String
member.summary: TypeScript string type.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Number
member.summary: TypeScript number type.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Bigint
member.summary: TypeScript bigint type.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Boolean
member.summary: TypeScript boolean type.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Symbol
member.summary: TypeScript symbol type. See https://www.typescriptlang.org/docs/handbook/symbols.html

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Undefined
member.summary: TypeScript undefined type.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Object
member.summary: TypeScript object type. The TypeScript object type represents all values that are not in primitive types. All other types here are primitive types.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Constants.TsTypes.Function
member.summary: TypeScript function type.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager
member.summary: Manager for working with constant definitions in XlfKeys.cs file

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.PathXlfKeys
member.summary: Path to XlfKeys.cs file

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.AddConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Add to XlfKeys.cs from xlf Must manually call XlfResourcesH.SaveResouresToRL(BasePathsHelper.sunamoProject) before Called externally from MiAddTranslationWhichIsntInKeys_Click
member.param: Optional list of values corresponding to keys. If null, keys will be used as values.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.AddConst(SunamoDevCode.CSharpGenerator,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds C# const code to the generator
member.param: Name of the constant to add

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.GetConsts
member.summary: Get consts which exists in XlfKeys.cs
member.returns: Tuple containing keys, first line index, and all lines

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.#ctor(System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of ConstsManager
member.param: Function to determine if key should be in XlfKeys

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.ConstsManager.AddKeysConsts(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Add constant keys to the generated code
member.param: List of all keys to add
Position where to insert the generated code
List of source code lines to modify
Optional list of values. If null, keys will be used as values.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter
member.summary: EN: Filter for C# files with configurable filtering rules CZ: Filtr pro C# soubory s konfigurovatelными pravidly filtrování
member.remarks: Cannot be derived from FiltersNotTranslateAble to make finding instances of CsFileFilter easier
member.summary: Cant be derived from FiltersNotTranslateAble because easy of finding instances of CsFileFilter

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.#ctor
member.summary: In default is everything in false Call some Set* method

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.GetFilesFiltered(System.String,System.String,System.IO.SearchOption)
member.summary: Gets filtered list of C# files based on configured filtering rules.
member.returns: Filtered list of file paths

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnly(System.String,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs)
member.summary: Checks if a file path is allowed based on end and contains filtering rules.
member.returns: True if the file is allowed, false if it should be filtered out

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnly(System.String,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean)
member.summary: A2 is also for master.designer.cs and aspx.designer.cs A2,3 can be null
member.param: Output parameter indicating if end pattern matched
Whether to also check end patterns
member.returns: True if the file is allowed, false if it should be filtered out

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Set(SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs)
member.summary: Sets the end and contains arguments for filtering.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.SetDefault
member.summary: Sets the default filtering configuration with standard exclusion patterns.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.GetContainsByFlags(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets list of "contains" patterns based on flags
member.param: Whether to negate the flag values
member.returns: List of contains patterns

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.GetEndingByFlags(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets list of file ending patterns based on configured flags.
member.param: Whether to negate the flag values
member.returns: List of file ending patterns

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnlyContains(System.String,SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs)
member.summary: Checks if a file path is allowed based on contains filtering rules only.
member.returns: True if the file is allowed, false if it should be filtered out

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains
member.summary: Constants and helper methods for path-contains based filtering patterns.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains.notTranslateAbleFp
member.summary: Pattern for files containing "NotTranslateAble" in the path.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains.objFp
member.summary: Pattern for files in the obj directory.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains.binFp
member.summary: Pattern for files in the bin directory.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains.tildaRFFp
member.summary: Pattern for files with tilda RF marker.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.Contains.FillEndFromFileList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Into A1 is inserting copy to leave only unindexed
member.returns: Configured ContainsArgs instance

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs
member.summary: Arguments controlling which path-contains patterns to include or exclude during filtering.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs.binFp
member.summary: Whether to include files from bin directories.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs.objFp
member.summary: Whether to include files from obj directories.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs.tildaRF
member.summary: Whether to include files with tilda RF marker.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.ContainsArgs.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: false which not to index, true which to index
member.param: Whether to include obj directory files
Whether to include bin directory files
Whether to include tilda RF files

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End
member.summary: Constants and helper methods for file-ending based filtering patterns.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.NotTranslateAblePp
member.summary: Pattern for NotTranslateAble files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.designerCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .designer.cs files (lowercase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.DesignerCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .Designer.cs files (PascalCase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.xamlCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .xaml.cs code-behind files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.sharedCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for Shared.cs files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.iCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .i.cs intermediate files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.gICsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .g.i.cs generated intermediate files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.gCsPp
member.summary: Pattern for .g.cs generated files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.tmpPp
member.summary: Pattern for .tmp temporary files (lowercase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.TMPPp
member.summary: Pattern for .TMP temporary files (uppercase).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.End.FillEndFromFileList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Into A1 is inserting copy to leave only unindexed
member.returns: Configured EndArgs instance

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs
member.summary: Arguments controlling which file endings to include or exclude during filtering.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.designerCs
member.summary: Whether to include .designer.cs files (lowercase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.DesignerCs
member.summary: Whether to include .Designer.cs files (uppercase D).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.gCs
member.summary: Whether to include .g.cs generated files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.gICs
member.summary: Whether to include .g.i.cs generated intermediate files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.iCs
member.summary: Whether to include .i.cs intermediate files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.notTranslateAble
member.summary: Whether to include files marked as not translatable.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.sharedCs
member.summary: Whether to include .shared.cs files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.tmp
member.summary: Whether to include .tmp files (lowercase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.TMP
member.summary: Whether to include .TMP files (uppercase).

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.xamlCs
member.summary: Whether to include .xaml.cs code-behind files.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.EndArgs.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: false which not to index, true which to index

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnly(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the given file path passes all filter criteria including both contains and end checks.
member.returns: True if the file is allowed by the filter.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnly(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Checks whether the given file path passes filter criteria, optionally including end-of-path checks.
member.param: Whether to also check file path endings.
member.returns: True if the file is allowed by the filter.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsFileFilter.AllowOnlyContains(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether the given file path passes the contains-only filter criteria.
member.returns: True if the file is allowed by the contains filter.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared
member.summary: EN: Although this is from CommandsToAllCsprojs.Shared, it is useful for all CommandsToAll* projects EN: Not adding it there as a single file but as an entire csproj CZ: Toto je sice z CommandsToAllCsprojs.Shared ale hodí se na to všechny CommandsToAll* CZ: Nepřidávám to tam jako soubor ale jako celý csproj

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared.DetectIsSlnOrCsprojFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,SunamoDevCode.Enums.WhatIsExcepted)
member.summary: Detects whether the folder contains a solution or csproj file. Returns true for sln, false for csproj, null for neither or both.
member.param: Preference when both sln and csproj exist.
member.returns: True for sln, false for csproj, null if neither or ambiguous.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared.GetCsprojForFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the single .csproj file in the given folder.
member.param: If true, throws on not found or multiple; if false, returns null.
member.returns: Path to the csproj file, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared.GetSlnForFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the single solution file (.sln, .slnx, .slnj) in the given folder.
member.param: If true, throws on not found; if false, returns null.
member.returns: Path to the solution file, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared.GetExtForFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the single file matching the extension in the given folder.
member.param: If true, throws on not found or multiple; if false, returns null.
File extension to search for (with or without leading dot).
member.returns: Path to the matching file, or null if not found.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.CsprojShared.HasSlnFileInUpFolder(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Checks whether a solution file exists in the parent folder of the given csproj path.
member.param: Output: the parent folder path where solution files were searched.
member.returns: True if at least one solution file exists in the parent folder.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution
member.summary: Represents the collection of csproj files and their folder paths within a solution.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution.CsprojFolderPaths
member.summary: List of folder paths containing csproj files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution.CsprojPaths
member.summary: List of full csproj file paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution.ToDictionary
member.summary: Converts the csproj folder paths and csproj paths to a dictionary.
member.returns: Dictionary mapping folder paths to csproj file paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution.TestBothHaveSameLength
member.summary: Tests that both lists have the same length.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution.Intersect(SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution)
member.summary: Intersects the current instance with another CsprojsInSolution instance.
member.param: Other CsprojsInSolution instance to merge with.
member.returns: The current instance with merged data.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine
member.summary: Represents a single line from dotnet build output containing error or warning information.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets the file path where the error/warning occurred.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Line
member.summary: Gets or sets the line number where the error/warning occurred.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Column
member.summary: Gets or sets the column number where the error/warning occurred.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of message (error, warning, etc.).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets or sets the error code (e.g., CS0103, CS0246).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the error/warning message text.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.DotnetBuildOutputLine.Deconstruct(System.String@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Deconstructs the build output line into individual components.
member.param: File path where the error/warning occurred.
Line number where the error/warning occurred.
Column number where the error/warning occurred.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.ExistsNonExistsList`1
member.summary: Generic class that separates items into two lists: existing and non-existing.
member.typeparam: Type of items in the lists.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.ExistsNonExistsList`1.Exists
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of items that exist.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.ExistsNonExistsList`1.NonExists
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of items that do not exist.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.ParseGlobalUsingsResult
member.summary: Result of parsing global usings from a C# file.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.ParseGlobalUsingsResult.GlobalUsings
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of global using statements.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.ParseGlobalUsingsResult.GlobalSymbols
member.summary: Gets or sets the dictionary of global symbols (e.g., #define symbols).

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles
member.summary: Singleton class that maintains collections of files that should not be indexed.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of UnindexableFiles.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.#ctor
member.summary: Prevents external instantiation.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.UnindexablePathPartsFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets files that should not be indexed based on path parts.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.UnindexableFileNamesFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets files that should not be indexed based on file names (partial match).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.UnindexableFileNamesExactlyFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets files that should not be indexed based on exact file names.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.UnindexablePathEndsFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets files that should not be indexed based on path endings.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Data.UnindexableFiles.UnindexablePathStartsFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets files that should not be indexed based on path starts.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Data.UniqueCsprojs
member.summary: EN: Loads all csproj in directory, can convert from path to name and vice versa CZ: Načte všechny csproj v dir, umí převádět z cesty na název a vice versa

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.UniqueCsprojs.AddFromSlnFolder(SunamoDevCode.Data.CsprojsInSolution)
member.summary: Populates the dictionary with csproj names and paths from the given solution if not already populated.
member.param: Solution containing csproj paths to add.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.UniqueCsprojs.ToName(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a csproj file path to its project name (file name without extension).
member.param: Full path to the csproj file.
member.returns: Project name extracted from the path.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Data.UniqueCsprojs.ToPath(System.String)
member.summary: EN: Converts to csproj path, not to folder path CZ: Převede na csproj path, nikoliv na cestu ke složce

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.DevNotTranslateAble
member.summary: Contains constant strings used in development that should not be translated.

member.summary: The x86 platform target identifier.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.DevNotTranslateAble.x64
member.summary: The x64 platform target identifier.

member.summary: Contains filters for files and paths that should not be processed for translation.

member.summary: Singleton instance of the filters.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FiltersNotTranslateAble.Contains
member.summary: List of substrings - if a path contains any of these, it should not be translated.

member.summary: Is good include the most files as is possible due to performamce

member.summary: AssemblyInfo.cs filename filter.

member.summary: Attributes folder/file filter.

member.summary: Consts folder/file filter.

member.summary: Credentials folder/file filter.

member.summary: EnigmaData.cs filename filter.

member.summary: Enums folder/file filter.

member.summary: Layer.cs filename filter.

member.summary: NotTranslateAble path part filter.

member.summary: in XLF is not available sess coz is in sunamo

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FiltersNotTranslateAble.WithoutDep
member.summary: All which is WithoutDep cant have Xlf If yes, I couldn't have Xlf.web and Xlf

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.FrameworkNameDetector
member.summary: Detects the .NET framework name and version from a project file.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FrameworkNameDetector.DefaultIdentifier
member.summary: Default .NET framework identifier used when none is specified in the project.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.FrameworkNameDetector.DefaultFrameworkVersion
member.summary: Default .NET framework version used when none is specified in the project.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FrameworkNameDetector.Detect(System.Object)
member.summary: Working only for .net fw, for sdk style return .net 4.0 Must return FrameworkName due to FubuCsProjFile

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.FSGetFilesDC
member.summary: Provides methods for retrieving files from solution and project directories with DevCode-specific filtering.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.FSGetFilesDC.GetFilesDC(System.String,System.String,System.IO.SearchOption,SunamoDevCode.Args.GetFilesDCArgs)
member.summary: Gets files from project directories within a solution folder, optionally filtering to _sunamo subfolders only.
member.param: Whether to search top directory only or all subdirectories.
member.returns: List of matching file paths.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GenerateJson
member.summary: Provides methods for generating JSON content using snake_case naming convention.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GenerateJson.WithSnakeConventionDict(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Creates a dictionary mapping snake_case keys to original values.
member.param: List of values to convert to snake_case keys.
member.returns: Dictionary with snake_case keys and original values.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GenerateJson.WithSnakeConvention(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a JSON-formatted string with snake_case keys mapped to original values.
member.param: List of values to include in the JSON output.
member.returns: JSON-formatted string.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs
member.summary: Provides methods for finding and enumerating csproj files across solutions and project folders.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojsAll(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Vrátí plné cesty k složce řešení

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetFoldersWithAtLeastOneCsprojInSolution(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Gets folders that contain exactly one csproj file within the given solution folder.
member.returns: List of folder paths containing exactly one csproj.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojInSwdNotmineAndSunamo(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Gets csproj files from the PlatformIndependentNuGetPackages solution folder.
member.returns: Collection of csprojs found in the solution.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojsAllDict(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Gets all csproj files as a dictionary mapping file names to full paths, excluding Runner.csproj.
member.returns: Dictionary of csproj file names to their full paths.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojInSolutionClass(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Rozdíl oproti GetCsprojInSolution je že vrací v objektu co je z GetCsprojInSolution v Tuple

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojInSolution(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary:
Rozdíl oproti GetCsprojInSolution je že vrací v objektu co je z GetCsprojInSolution v Tuple
1 - csprojFolderPaths 2 - csprojPaths
member.param: Solution folder to search for csproj files.
member.returns: Tuple of (csprojFolderPaths, csprojPaths).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetCsprojs.GetCsprojsInSolution(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all csproj file paths within the specified solution folder. Deprecated in favor of GetCsprojInSolution.
member.param: Solution folder to search for csproj files.
member.returns: List of csproj file paths.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GetSlns
member.summary: Provides methods for retrieving Visual Studio solution folders.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GetSlns.GetSolutions(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets all solution folder paths, optionally filtered to C# projects only.
member.param: If true, returns only C# project solution folders.
member.returns: List of solution folder paths.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsHelper
member.summary: Druhá část je v ToNugets Vložit sem jak toto šílenství s nugety skončí

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsHelper.globalUsing
member.summary: Prefix for global using directives in C# source files.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsHelper.global
member.summary: Prefix for global directives (used for global symbols with = assignments).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsHelper.Parse(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Parses a list of lines to extract global using directives and global symbol definitions.
member.returns: Parsed result containing global usings and symbols.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsInstance
member.summary: Manages global using declarations in a C# file, supporting adding, removing, and saving.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsInstance.Init(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the instance by reading and parsing the global usings file at the given path.
member.param: Path to the global usings file.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsInstance.AddNewGlobalUsing(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new global using namespace if it is not already present.
member.param: Namespace to add as global using.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsInstance.RemoveGlobalUsingsStartingWith(System.String)
member.summary: EN: Remove all global usings that start with the specified prefix (case insensitive) CZ: Odstraň všechny global usings které začínají zadaným prefixem (case insensitive)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.GlobalUsingsInstance.Save
member.summary: Saves the current global usings and symbols back to the file.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Helpers.RemoveCommentsHelper
member.summary: Jednotné místo pro remove commentů odevšad protože jsem chtěl odst # a nemohl jsem si vzpomenout kde se používají

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Helpers.RemoveCommentsHelper.Powershell(System.String)
member.summary: Removes PowerShell comment lines (starting with #) from the given text.
member.returns: Text with comment lines removed.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.HtmlSB
member.summary: InstantSB(can specify own delimiter, check whether dont exists) TextBuilder(implements Undo, save to Sb or List) HtmlSB(Same as InstantSB, use br)

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.HtmlSB.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of HtmlSB using HTML break tag as delimiter.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Interfaces.ICsFileFilter
member.summary: Interface for filtering C# files

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Interfaces.ICsFileFilter.GetFilesFiltered(System.String,System.String,System.IO.SearchOption)
member.summary: Gets filtered list of files
member.returns: Filtered list of file paths

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.ProjectTypeGuid
member.summary: Contains Visual Studio project type GUIDs for different project types.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ProjectTypeGuid.Unspecified
member.summary: Represents an unspecified project type GUID.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.ProjectTypeGuid.WellKnown
member.summary: Dictionary mapping project type GUIDs to their human-readable names.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData
member.summary: EN: Data for generating file mask for repository. Unsure what would be better - explicitly allowing (source files) or explicitly forbidding (e.g., images, archives). Later can add all source_file from AllExtensions here. CZ: Data pro generování masky souborů pro repozitář. Nevím co by bylo lepší - zda explicitně povolovat (zdrojové soubory) nebo explicitně zakazovat (např. obrázky), archívy. Později zde můžu přidat všechny source_file z AllExtensions.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Cs
member.summary: Whether to include C# (.cs) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Css
member.summary: Whether to include CSS (.css) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.JsJsx
member.summary: Whether to include JavaScript (.js, .jsx) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Json
member.summary: Whether to include JSON (.json) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Scss
member.summary: Whether to include SCSS (.scss) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.TsTsx
member.summary: Whether to include TypeScript (.ts, .tsx) files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Yaml
member.summary: Whether to include YAML (.yaml) files.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.NumbersOf(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Counts how many file type flags match the specified value.
member.param: Value to compare each flag against.
member.returns: Number of flags matching the value.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.AllSourceCodes
member.summary: Creates a new instance with all source code file types enabled.
member.returns: A new instance with all flags set to true.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.AllTo(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets all file type flags to the specified value.
member.param: Value to set all flags to.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.RepoGetFileMascGeneratorData.Generate
member.summary: Generates a semicolon-separated file mask string based on enabled file types.
member.returns: File mask string (e.g., "*.ts;*.tsx;*.cs;").

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService
member.summary: Service for adding or editing file-scoped namespace declarations in C# source files.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService.AddOrEditNamespaceForSingleFileAndSave(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Adds or edits namespace declaration in a single C# file and saves it
member.returns: New namespace or null if file was skipped

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService.AddNamespaceIfIsMissingInCs(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Pracovní metoda která se už volá na konkrétní soubor Volána z AddNamespaceByInputFolderName
member.param: File content as list of lines.
member.returns: Modified file content with namespace added.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService.classCodeElements
member.summary: Keywords that indicate the start of a type declaration in C# source code.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService.RemoveFileScopedNamespaceWhenIsInSharpIf(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: FUnguje to OK, prošel jsem si všechny soubory před commitem
member.param: File content as list of lines.
member.returns: Modified file content with file-scoped namespace removed when inside #if directive.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Services.AddOrEditNamespaceService.AddNamespaceOnBegin(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Přidá nový file scoped namespace na začátek souboru

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Services.DotnetOutputService
member.summary: Service for parsing dotnet build output

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.Services.DotnetOutputService.GetPartsFromDotnetBuildLine(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a single line from dotnet build output into structured format
member.returns: Parsed output line or null if line is not parseable

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper
member.summary: Helper methods for common SunamoDevCode operations like file cleanup and solution copying.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.TryDeleteDirectory(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to delete a directory. If the first attempt fails, normalizes file attributes and retries.
member.param: Path to the directory to delete.
member.returns: True if the directory was successfully deleted or does not exist.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.CopySolution(System.String,System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Copies a solution folder to a destination, excluding temporary VS files and git files, then creates an archive.
member.param: Action to create an archive from the copied folder.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.RemoveGitFiles(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Removes git-related files and downloaded/temporary folder entries from the file list.
member.param: List of file paths to filter in-place.
Whether to keep git files (true) or remove them (false).
Whether to keep downloaded folders (true) or remove them (false).
Whether to keep folders marked for deletion (true) or remove them (false).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.RemoveTemporaryFilesVS(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes Visual Studio temporary files (bin, obj, packages, etc.) from the file list.
member.param: List of file paths to filter in-place.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.IsNameOfHtmlTag(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Determines whether the given text is a known HTML tag name, optionally with a numeric suffix.
member.param: Text to check against known HTML tags.
Initial value indicating whether to add (overwritten internally).
member.returns: True if the text matches an HTML tag name.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoDevCodeHelper.IsNameOfControl(System.String)
member.summary: A1 normal, not lower

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.SunamoFramework
member.summary: Provides utility methods for the Sunamo framework including HTML entity processing.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.SunamoFramework.HtmlEntitiesForNonDigitsOrLetterChars
member.summary: Identifies non-digit, non-letter characters in translation data and maps them to their HTML entities.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Templates.SqlTemplates
member.summary: SQL query templates.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Templates.SqlTemplates.Select
member.summary: SELECT query template with table name placeholder.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.Templates.SqlTemplates.UseSunamoCz
member.summary: USE database command for sunamo.cz database.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat
member.summary: Writes C# files with proper formatting: file-scoped namespace, sorted usings, and trimmed whitespace.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat.WriteAllTextSync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Synchronously writes text to a C# file with proper formatting.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat.WriteAllLinesSync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Synchronously writes lines to a C# file with proper formatting.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat.WriteAllText(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously writes text to a C# file with proper formatting (file-scoped namespace, sorted usings).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat.WriteAllLines(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Asynchronously writes lines to a C# file with proper formatting (file-scoped namespace, sorted usings).

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TFCsFormat.TrimWhiteSpaceRowFromEnd(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Removes trailing whitespace-only lines from the end of the list.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.TrimerTags
member.summary: Utility for trimming wrapping HTML tags (b, i, u) from text content.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TrimerTags.TrimWrappingTag(System.String,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Trims the outermost wrapping HTML tag from the given HTML string, recording removed tags.
member.param: StringBuilder to record the opening tag removed from the start.
StringBuilder to record the closing tag removed from the end.
member.returns: HTML with the outermost wrapping tag removed.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.TrimerTags.InitTagsWrapping
member.summary: Initializes the wrapping tag lists with common formatting tags (i, b, u) in both cases.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable
member.summary: Holds collections of unindexable path patterns loaded from configuration files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable.UnindexableFileNames
member.summary: Collection of file name patterns that should not be indexed (partial match).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable.UnindexableFileNamesExactly
member.summary: Collection of exact file names that should not be indexed.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable.UnindexablePathEnds
member.summary: Collection of path ending patterns that should not be indexed.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable.UnindexablePathParts
member.summary: Collection of path substring patterns that should not be indexed.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.Unindexable.UnindexablePathStarts
member.summary: Collection of path prefix patterns that should not be indexed.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames
member.summary: Contains the file names for unindexable path configuration files.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance providing access to unindexable file name constants.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.FileUnindexableFileNames
member.summary: File name for the list of unindexable file names (partial match).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.FileUnindexableFileNamesExactly
member.summary: File name for the list of exact unindexable file names.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.FileUnindexablePathEnds
member.summary: File name for the list of unindexable path endings.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.FileUnindexablePathParts
member.summary: File name for the list of unindexable path parts (substrings).

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesNames.FileUnindexablePathStarts
member.summary: File name for the list of unindexable path starts (prefixes).

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths
member.summary: Holds full paths to the unindexable files configuration files, resolved from a base path.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.FileUnindexableFileNames
member.summary: Full path to the file listing unindexable file names.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.FileUnindexableFileNamesExactly
member.summary: Full path to the file listing exact unindexable file names.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.FileUnindexablePathEnds
member.summary: Full path to the file listing unindexable path endings.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.FileUnindexablePathParts
member.summary: Full path to the file listing unindexable path parts.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.FileUnindexablePathStarts
member.summary: Full path to the file listing unindexable path starts.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes paths by combining the base path with unindexable file name constants.
member.param: Base directory path for the configuration files.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper
member.summary: Helper class for managing Unindexable paths and files configuration.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.Unindexable
member.summary: Gets or sets the Unindexable configuration.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.UnindexablePathParts
member.summary: Gets the Unindexable path parts configuration.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.UnindexableFileNames
member.summary: Gets the Unindexable file names configuration.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.UnindexablePathEnds
member.summary: Gets the Unindexable path ends configuration.

member.name: P:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.UnindexablePathStarts
member.summary: Gets the Unindexable path starts configuration.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.Load(SunamoDevCode.UnindexableFilesPaths)
member.summary: Into A1 insert SearchCodeElementsUC .ufp

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.IsToIndexedFolder(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified path should be indexed based on folder rules.
member.returns: True if the folder should be indexed, false otherwise.

member.name: M:SunamoDevCode.UnindexableHelper.IsToIndexed(System.String,System.String,System.Func{System.String,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Determines whether the specified file should be indexed based on path and file name rules.
member.returns: True if the file should be indexed, false otherwise.

member.name: T:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts
member.summary: Constants and keyword lists for Vue.js source code parsing and generation.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.Cl
member.summary: Class keyword with trailing space.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.Constructor
member.summary: Constructor keyword.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.Import
member.summary: Import keyword.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.Export
member.summary: Export keyword.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.MethodsRcub
member.summary: Methods section opening with curly brace.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.PropsRcub
member.summary: Props section opening with curly brace.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.SStartWith
member.summary: Vue component options that should be matched by StartsWith.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.DontAddRcub
member.summary: Sections where right curly brace should not be added automatically.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.ContainsList
member.summary: Keywords to match using Contains check.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.StartWithList
member.summary: Keywords to match using StartsWith check.

member.name: F:SunamoDevCode.VueConsts.Equal
member.summary: Characters treated as assignment operators.
